ORDER DENYING CLAIMANT ABRAHAM RASCON'S PETITION TO COMPEL BINDING ARBITRATION AND REQUEST FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ABRAHAM RASCON'S MOTION ON PETITION TO COMPEL BINDING ARBITRATION AND REQUEST FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING REFILED IN CONTRA COSTA COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT. THIS ACTION IS TRANSFERRED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT TO ALLOW THAT COURT TO MAKE A DETERMINATION REGARDING THE GATEWAY ISSUE WHETHER MR. RASCON IS AN INSURED UNDER CSAA'S POLICY. MR. RASCON SHALL PAY ALL REQUIRED TRANSFER FEES. THERE IS NO BASIS FOR SAN FRANCISCO VENUE AND THE EVIDENCE SUBMITTED BY RESPONDENT CSAA INSURANCE GROUP ESTABLISHES THAT THE CASE SHOULD BE ADJUDICATED IN CONTRA COSTA COUNTY. (MARCUS DEC., PAR. 2; EXS. 1 AND 2.) ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/HK)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion On Petition And Motion On Petition To Compel Binding Arbitration And Request For Declaratory Relief
Off Calendar Nov-14-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER ABRAHAM RASCON's Motion On Petition To Compel Binding Arbitration And Request For Declaratory Relief.

Claimant Abraham Rascon's petition to compel arbitration is denied without prejudice to being refiled in Contra Costa County Superior Court. This action is transferred to Contra Costa County Superior Court to allow that court to make a determination regarding the gateway issue whether Mr. Rascon is an insured under CSAA's policy. Mr. Rascon shall pay all required transfer fees. There is no basis for San Francisco venue and the evidence submitted by respondent CSAA Insurance Group establishes that the case should be adjudicated in Contra Costa County. (Marcus Dec., par. 2; Exs. 1 and 2.)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
